mapper.select:
SELECT id, inchikey, canonical_smiles, pubchem_cid, molecular_formula, molecular_weight, exact_mass, heavy_atom_count, num_atoms, num_bonds, num_rings, h_bond_donors, h_bond_acceptors, logp, tpsa, rotatable_bonds, fraction_csp3, compound_name FROM tcm_compounds
(inchikey LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR molecular_formula LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR canonical_smiles LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR compound_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.inchikey, c.canonical_smiles, c.pubchem_cid, c.molecular_formula, c.molecular_weight, c.exact_mass, c.heavy_atom_count, c.num_atoms, c.num_bonds, c.num_rings, c.h_bond_donors, c.h_bond_acceptors, c.logp, c.tpsa, c.rotatable_bonds, c.fraction_csp3, c.compound_name FROM tcm_compounds c INNER JOIN herb_compound_rel hc ON c.inchikey = hc.inchikey WHERE hc.tcm_herb_id = #{tcmHerbId} ORDER BY c.id ASC

SELECT id, inchikey, canonical_smiles, pubchem_cid, molecular_formula, molecular_weight, exact_mass, heavy_atom_count, num_atoms, num_bonds, num_rings, h_bond_donors, h_bond_acceptors, logp, tpsa, rotatable_bonds, fraction_csp3, compound_name FROM tcm_compounds WHERE inchikey = #{inchikey}

SELECT t.id, t.tcm_tar_id AS tcmTarId, t.gene_entrez_id AS geneEntrezId, t.symbol, t.uniprot_id AS uniprotId, t.ensembl_id AS ensemblId, t.description, t.type_of_gene AS typeOfGene FROM targets t INNER JOIN compound_target_rel ct ON t.tcm_tar_id = ct.tcm_tar_id WHERE ct.inchikey = #{inchikey} ORDER BY t.id ASC

SELECT id, inchikey, ames, bbbp, bioavailability, caco2, carcinogens, clearance_microsome AS clearanceMicrosome, clintox, cyp1a2_inhibition AS cyp1a2Inhibition, cyp2c19_inhibition AS cyp2c19Inhibition, cyp2c9_inhibition AS cyp2c9Inhibition, cyp2c9_substrate AS cyp2c9Substrate, cyp2d6_inhibition AS cyp2d6Inhibition, cyp2d6_substrate AS cyp2d6Substrate, cyp3a4_inhibition AS cyp3a4Inhibition, cyp3a4_substrate AS cyp3a4Substrate, dili, freesolv, herg_blockers AS hergBlockers, herg_karim AS hergKarim, hia, ld50, lipophilicity, pampa, pgp, ppbr, skin, solubility FROM compound_admet WHERE inchikey = #{inchikey}
SELECT c.id, c.inchikey, c.molecular_formula AS molecularFormula FROM tcm_compounds c INNER JOIN herb_compound_rel hc ON c.inchikey = hc.inchikey WHERE hc.tcm_herb_id = #{herbId} ORDER BY c.id ASC

SELECT t.id, t.symbol, t.gene_entrez_id AS geneEntrezId, t.uniprot_id AS uniprotId, t.description FROM targets t INNER JOIN compound_target_rel ct ON t.tcm_tar_id = ct.tcm_tar_id WHERE ct.inchikey = #{inchikey} ORDER BY t.id ASC

SELECT h.id, h.tcm_herb_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, h.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, h.latin_name AS latinName, h.english_name AS englishName, h.type, h.efficacy_zh AS efficacyZh, h.function_en AS functionEn, h.efficacy_category AS efficacyCategory FROM core_tcm_herbs h INNER JOIN herb_compound_rel hc ON h.tcm_herb_id = hc.tcm_herb_id WHERE hc.inchikey = #{inchikey} ORDER BY h.id ASC

SELECT ct.id, ct.inchikey, ct.gen AS geneEntrezId, ct.log2_fc_avg AS log2FcAvg, ct.p_value AS pValue, ct.direction, ct.source, CASE WHEN ct.p_value < 0.06 THEN 'significant' ELSE 'not_significant' END AS significance, CASE WHEN ct.p_value < 0.002 THEN '***' WHEN ct.p_value < 0.02 THEN '**' WHEN ct.p_value < 0.06 THEN '*' ELSE 'ns' END AS significanceLabel FROM compound_transcriptomics ct WHERE ct.inchikey = #{inchikey} ORDER BY ABS(ct.log2_fc_avg) DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS upregulatedGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS downregulatedGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'up' AND ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantUpregulated, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'down' AND ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantDownregulated, MAX(ABS(log2_fc_avg)) AS maxAbsLog2Fc, MIN(p_value) AS minPValue FROM compound_transcriptomics WHERE inchikey = #{inchikey}
